an3.107:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, (1) in the Noble One's discipline, singing is wailing. (2) In the Noble One's discipline, dancing is madness. (3) In the Noble One's discipline, to laugh excessively, displaying one's teeth, is childishness. Therefore, bhikkhus, in regard to singing and dancinglet there bethe demolition of the bridge. When you smile rejoicing in the Dhamma, you may simply show a smile."
